indicators.name: low ceiling height
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling height can lead to feelings of claustrophobia and discomfort, which are counterproductive to sleep.

indicators.name: dark pendant light
indicators.rationale: Dark pendant light may be too dim for reading or other activities but could be too bright for sleep.

indicators.name: no visible bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or resting surface makes it unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene has a low ceiling height and a dark pendant light, which could be too bright for sleep. There is no visible bed or resting surface, making it unsuitable for sleep.
